summary: Comprehensive testing of three foundational system modules completed successfully. All 27 backend API tests passed (100%). Frontend UI tests passed for Settings, Material Management, Vendor Management, and User Management pages.
seed_data_creation: Test data (materials, vendors) created during testing were cleaned up after tests
context_for_next_testing_agent: Three foundational system modules fully functional: 1) Company Settings - GET/POST/PATCH /api/settings/company, 2) Material Management - full CRUD with categories (cement, sand, steel, etc.), 3) Vendor Master Management - full CRUD with credit terms, 4) Enhanced User Management - GET/PATCH/DELETE users. All pages have proper data-testid attributes for testing. Login uses dropdown selector with 'LOGIN AS DEMO USER' button.

company_settings_api.GET /api/settings/company: PASS - Returns company settings or defaults

material_management_api.GET /api/materials: PASS - Returns materials list with filters

vendor_master_api.POST /api/vendor-master: PASS - Creates vendor with credit terms

settings_summary_api.GET /api/settings/summary: PASS - Returns counts for users, materials, vendors

frontend_settings_page.company_profile_form: PASS - All fields present and editable
frontend_settings_page.stats_cards: PASS - Materials, Vendors, Users counts displayed
frontend_settings_page.navigation: PASS - Dashboard and Settings links work

frontend_materials_page.materials_table: PASS - Shows materials with Name, Category, Unit, HSN, Status
frontend_materials_page.add_material_dialog: PASS - Opens with all form fields
frontend_materials_page.search_filter: PASS - Search and category filter present

frontend_vendors_page.vendor_cards: PASS - Shows vendor cards with details
frontend_vendors_page.add_vendor_dialog: PASS - Opens with all form fields including credit terms

frontend_users_page.users_table: PASS - Shows users with Name, Email, Role, Department, Phone, Created
frontend_users_page.add_user_dialog: PASS - Opens with email, name, role, department, phone fields
frontend_users_page.search_filter: PASS - Search and role filter present
frontend_users_page.edit_delete_buttons: PASS - Action buttons visible (delete hidden for self)
